SEARCH

Package edu.touro.mco152.bm.ui

package edu.touro.mco152.bm.ui
Contains GUI classes for the BadBM disk benchmarking application. Provides windows and frames for selecting directories, displaying progress, and interacting with the benchmark process.
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    edu.touro.mco152.bm
     
    edu.touro.mco152.bm.persist
    A container for utility classes that help with handling persistent data.
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    Gui
    Creates a graph and fills it with data and results from current run, and allows for easy access by storing a reference to the GUI
    MainFrame
    Creates the MainFrame with methods that enable easy control
    RunPanel
     
    SelectFrame
    GUI window that allows the user to select directory for running the benchmark.
